components.description:
Standardized Accordion Component

Accessible accordion with keyboard navigation, proper ARIA, and theme support.

Example :
<otui-accordion
  [sections]="accordionData"
  [variant]="'glass'"
  [multiple]="true"
  (sectionToggle)="onToggle($event)"
>
</otui-accordion>
components.rawdescription:
Standardized Accordion Component

Accessible accordion with keyboard navigation, proper ARIA, and theme support.

```html
<otui-accordion
  [sections]="accordionData"
  [variant]="'glass'"
  [multiple]="true"
  (sectionToggle)="onToggle($event)"
>
</otui-accordion>
```
components.templateData:
{{ section.heading }}

{{ section.content }}

components.name: BadgeComponent

inputsClass.name: shape
inputsClass.rawdescription: Visual treatment. Defaults to `soft` for non-blocking inline use.
inputsClass.description: Visual treatment. Defaults to soft for non-blocking inline use.

inputsClass.name: tone
inputsClass.rawdescription: Semantic tone of the badge. Drives `--<tone>` / `--on-<tone>` tokens.
inputsClass.description: Semantic tone of the badge. Drives --<tone> / --on-<tone> tokens.

inputsClass.name: variant
inputsClass.rawdescription:
Legacy alias retained for callers that still pass `variant`. New code
should set `tone` directly. When both are provided, `tone` wins.
inputsClass.description: Legacy alias retained for callers that still pass variant. New code should set tone directly. When both are provided, tone wins.

setSignature.name: variant
setSignature.rawdescription:
Legacy alias retained for callers that still pass `variant`. New code
should set `tone` directly. When both are provided, `tone` wins.
setSignature.description: Legacy alias retained for callers that still pass variant. New code should set tone directly. When both are provided, tone wins.

components.description:
Unified Grid Component

Combines Grid and GridLayout functionality into a single, powerful component. Supports both grid and flexible layout patterns with full responsive control.

Example :
<otui-grid [columns]="3" [rows]="auto" gap="md"></otui-grid>
<otui-grid [columns]="auto-fit" [minColumnWidth]="200px"></otui-grid>
<otui-grid layout="horizontal" gap="lg"></otui-grid>
components.rawdescription:
Unified Grid Component

Combines Grid and GridLayout functionality into a single, powerful component.
Supports both grid and flexible layout patterns with full responsive control.

```html
<otui-grid [columns]="3" [rows]="auto" gap="md"></otui-grid>
<otui-grid [columns]="auto-fit" [minColumnWidth]="200px"></otui-grid>
<otui-grid layout="horizontal" gap="lg"></otui-grid>
```

components.description:
Standardized List Component

Accessible list component with keyboard navigation, proper ARIA, and theme support.

Example :
<otui-list
  [items]="listItems"
  [type]="'bullet'"
  [variant]="'glass'"
  [clickable]="true"
  (itemSelect)="onItemClick($event)"
></otui-list>
components.rawdescription:
Standardized List Component

Accessible list component with keyboard navigation, proper ARIA, and theme support.

```html
<otui-list
  [items]="listItems"
  [type]="'bullet'"
  [variant]="'glass'"
  [clickable]="true"
  (itemSelect)="onItemClick($event)"
></otui-list>
```

components.description:
Standardized Modal Component

Fully accessible modal with focus trap, keyboard navigation, and theme support.

Example :
<otui-modal
  [visible]="showModal"
  [size]="'lg'"
  [position]="'center'"
  [closable]="true"
  [backdrop]="true"
  [ariaLabel]="'User Details'"
  (close)="showModal = false"
>
  <h2 modal-title>User Details</h2>
  <p>Modal content here...</p>
</otui-modal>
components.rawdescription:
Standardized Modal Component Fully accessible modal with focus trap, keyboard navigation, and theme support. ```html

components.description:
Standardized Notification Component

Fully accessible notification/toast system with ARIA live regions and theme support.

Example :
<!-- Single notification -->
<otui-notification
  [notification]="notification"
  [type]="'success'"
  [closable]="true"
  (dismiss)="onDismiss($event)"
></otui-notification>
___COMPODOC_EMPTY_LINE___
<!-- Notification bell with dropdown -->
<otui-notification
  [notifications]="notifications"
  [position]="'top-right'"
  [showBell]="true"
  (notificationCleared)="onClear($event)"
></otui-notification>
components.rawdescription:
Standardized Notification Component

Fully accessible notification/toast system with ARIA live regions and theme support.

```html
<!-- Single notification -->
<otui-notification
  [notification]="notification"
  [type]="'success'"
  [closable]="true"
  (dismiss)="onDismiss($event)"
></otui-notification>
___COMPODOC_EMPTY_LINE___
<!-- Notification bell with dropdown -->
<otui-notification
  [notifications]="notifications"
  [position]="'top-right'"
  [showBell]="true"
  (notificationCleared)="onClear($event)"
></otui-notification>
```

components.description:
Themed page/section header.

Defaults derive from semantic theme tokens. The legacy background, padding, borderRadius, and color inputs remain for backward compatibility but should not be set in new code; instead let the consuming personality drive appearance via CSS custom properties.

Defaults derive from semantic theme tokens. The legacy `background`,
`padding`, `borderRadius`, and `color` inputs remain for backward
compatibility but should not be set in new code; instead let the consuming
personality drive appearance via CSS custom properties.

components.description:
Standardized Table Component

Fully accessible semantic table with sorting, selection, and theme support.

Example :
<otui-table
  [columns]="columns"
  [data]="rows"
  [selectable]="true"
  [sortable]="true"
  [striped]="true"
  (rowSelect)="onSelect($event)"
  (sort)="onSort($event)"
></otui-table>

typealiases.description:
Visual treatment.

  • solid — filled background, --on-<tone> foreground.
  • soft — translucent background mixed from the tone, foreground = tone.
  • outline — transparent background, bordered, foreground = tone.

Visual treatment.

  • solid — filled background, --on-<tone> foreground.
  • soft — translucent background mixed from the tone, foreground = tone.
  • outline — transparent background, bordered, foreground = tone.

libs/common-ui/src/lib/common-ui/badge.c.name: BadgeTone
libs/common-ui/src/lib/common-ui/badge.c.description: Canonical badge tones. Map to the matching --<tone> and --on-<tone> tokens written by ThemeService.
